notes: Community aggregated data (ThePriceDex): rare holo 1/5.6, V 1/11.1, VMAX 1/26.5, ultra rare (full/alt arts) 1/26, rainbow rare 1/91.9, gold (secret) 1/120 — overall hit rate ~18.6%/pack, corroborated by a 630-pack sample (RipOrFlip: hits 18.5% + secrets 2.4%). TCGplayer cracked 4,000+ packs pre-release (table published only as an image, cited as corroboration). No Trainer Gallery, radiant or amazing rares in this set; reverse filler approximated 50/50 common/uncommon. Residual mass on non-holo rare. packSize excludes the basic Energy and code card. SWSH ETB contains 8 packs.
